name: Contentful
description: Monitor Contentful headless CMS for user access and content environment separation compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Contentful at https://app.contentful.com
2. Go to Settings → CMA Tokens
3. Generate a Personal Access Token
4. Copy and enter it below

credentialFields.label: Personal Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Contentful Settings → CMA Tokens (Content Management API token)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Contentful organization members and their content management roles

checks.name: Separation of Environments
checks.description: Verifies Contentful spaces have separate environments for development and production
